title: Bridge Essay: Cardiac interoception in Anorexia Nervosa: A resting-state heartbeat-evoked potential study.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Cardiac interoception in Anorexia Nervosa: A resting-state heartbeat-evoked potential study.** — Eur Eat Disord Rev (2024). DOI: 10.1002/erv.3049. PMID: 38009624. OBJECTIVE: A deficit in interoception - the ability to perceive, interpret and integrate afferent signals about the physiological state of the body - has been shown in Anorexia Nervosa (AN), and linked to altered hunger sensations, body dysmorphia, and abnormal emotional awareness. The present high-density electroencephalography (hdEEG) study aims to assess cardiac interoception in AN and to investigate its neural correlates, using an objective neurophysiological measure. METHOD: Heartbeat-evoke

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 11 (Body-energy). Evaluation: Excellent (score=5.0)
